# Reflections

> Encrypted private journal for notes, moods, and the people who matter. AI stays optional and writing comes first.

**What it is**
Reflections is a private journal where users write notes, name moods, add tags, and notice patterns over time. Private writing is encrypted on the user's device before it is saved, using a key derived from the user's password that the server never sees. AI support runs only when the user chooses it or turns on Smart Mode.

**Who it's for**
People who want a quiet place to think in writing, without pressure loops, public sharing, or AI that runs without being asked.

**Privacy and encryption**
Notes, moods, future letters, attachments, Life Wiki pages, and relationships are encrypted on the device with a key only the user holds. The server stores data it cannot read. A recovery phrase set when private writing is turned on is the only other way in if the password is forgotten; Reflections cannot reset it.

**Key features**
- Private rich-text journal with mood tracking, tags, tasks, and attachments
- Device-side zero-knowledge encryption for notes, moods, letters, attachments, Life Wiki, and relationships
- Relationships: a quiet place to keep track of people you want to stay close to, with a few weekly suggestions for who to reach out to and why
- Life Wiki: AI-supported pages that grow from saved writing when the user asks
- AI reflections for moments when users want another lens on a note
- Ambient soundscapes, whisper-to-text, focus mode, breathing exercises
- Future Letters: write to your future self
- Available as web app, PWA, and Android APK

**Pricing**
- Free: 30 notes/month, one AI reflection sample, one Life Wiki refresh after enough writing. Relationships and device-side encryption are included.
- Pro weekly: ₹49/week after a 3-day trial
- Pro monthly: ₹149/month after a 3-day trial
- No payment is due during the trial. See the pricing file under Links for machine-readable details.

- [OKF knowledge bundle](https://www.reflections-sanctuary.space/okf/index.md): Standardized knowledge structure for AI crawlers
